name: skills-house
description: Framework for authoring, building, and shipping Agent Skills — not a skill catalog.
author: al4f <https://al4f.dev>

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @skills-house/build build && pnpm --filter @skills-house/cli build && pnpm --filter "./skills/*" build
scripts.validate: pnpm --filter "./skills/*" run validate --if-present && pnpm --filter "./scripts/*" run validate --if-present && pnpm --filter @skills-house/build validate
